mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND status = 'COMPLETED'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.subscriber_id) FROM subscriptions s INNER JOIN subscription_plans sp ON s.plan_id = sp.id INNER JOIN items i ON sp.item_id = i.id WHERE i.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND s.status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT TO_CHAR(paid_at, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS revenue, COALESCE(SUM(amount) / 10, 0) AS fee, COALESCE(SUM(amount) - SUM(amount) / 10, 0) AS netRevenue FROM orders WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND status = 'COMPLETED' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM paid_at) = #{year} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(paid_at, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT i.id AS itemId, i.title AS title, i.price AS price, i.sale_type AS saleType, (SELECT img.image_url FROM item_images img WHERE img.item_id = i.id AND img.is_thumbnail = true LIMIT 1) AS thumbnailUrl FROM items i WHERE i.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND i.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND i.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY i.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.subscriber_id) FROM subscriptions s INNER JOIN subscription_plans sp ON s.plan_id = sp.id INNER JOIN items i ON sp.item_id = i.id WHERE i.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND s.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'CANCEL_REQUESTED')
